title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Infosys - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Infosys - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Infosys has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Infosys:
Infosys is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
